nasb.text: When he had left the crowd and entered the house, His disciples questioned Him about the parable.

esv.text: And when he had entered the house and left the people, his disciples asked him about the parable.

cnv.text: 耶穌離開群眾，進了屋子，門徒就來問他這比喻的意思。

ccb.text: 耶稣离开众人，进了屋子，门徒问祂这比喻的意思。

csbs.text: 耶稣离开人群，一进了房子，他的门徒们就问他这比喻的意思。
